page: Vultr vcg-l40s-128c-1500g-384vram is a high-density GPU-accelerated virtual server within the Cloud GPU family. It is built on the Intel x86_64 CPU architecture, providing 128 shared vCPUs and a substantial system memory allocation of 1500.0 GB. This configuration yields approximately 11.72 GB of RAM per core, accommodating large datasets in active memory.

The primary performance driver of this instance is its graphics hardware array, which consists of eight NVIDIA L40S GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture. These GPUs deliver a combined total of 384 GB of VRAM, with each GPU providing 48 GB of dedicated memory. For local storage, the server is equipped with a 3400 GB NVMe SSD, ensuring high-throughput data access. The network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

This instance is engineered for workloads that require massive parallel processing capabilities and high memory density. It is highly suitable for deep learning model training, large-scale artificial intelligence inference, complex rendering pipelines, and intensive data science workloads.
description: Vultr vcg-l40s-128c-1500g-384vram is a high-density GPU-accelerated server designed for demanding parallel computing workloads. Built on the Intel x86_64 architecture, the instance provides 128 shared vCPUs and 1500.0 GB of system memory, yielding 11.72 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is driven by eight NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace family, offering a total of 384 GB of VRAM. For local storage, the configuration includes a 3400 GB NVMe SSD, facilitating rapid data retrieval. The server is provisioned with one complimentary public IPv4 address. Given its massive GPU memory and high system RAM capacity, this instance is optimized for large-scale artificial intelligence workloads, deep learning model training, complex simulations, and data-intensive scientific computing.
og_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-128c-1500g-384vram is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 128 Intel vCPUs, 1500 GB of system RAM, eight NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 384 GB of total VRAM, and a 3400 GB local NVMe SSD.

tagline: An ultra-high-capacity GPU platform featuring eight accelerators and massive system memory for parallel computing and artificial intelligence workloads.

128 Intel x86_64 shared vCPUs with 1500.0 GB system memory
